app.title: AI editor for DOCX/DOC/PDF via Markdown
sidebar.text_operation_help: Literary editing improves text that is already in the selected language. Use Translation for text that is not yet in the target language. If the text is already translated, literary editing is usually the better choice.
sidebar.source_language_help: Use 'Auto' only as a best-effort mode. For already-translated text, literary editing is usually the better choice.
sidebar.same_language_warning: The source and target language are the same. If you only need a stylistic upgrade, literary editing is usually the better choice.
sidebar.second_pass_help: Runs a second pass over the already-translated text only. It usually improves style but increases processing time and cost.
sidebar.audiobook_postprocess_help: Prepares a separate narration text for ElevenLabs without changing the main DOCX/Markdown result.
sidebar.custom_model_help: You can specify a provider-qualified selector, e.g. openrouter:google/gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview.
sidebar.image_mode_audiobook_caption: In audiobook mode, images are always left unchanged.
sidebar.keep_variants_help: Keeps all generated image variants for later comparison.
image.desc_no_change: Leaves all images as they are, without any processing.
image.desc_safe: Slightly improves the source image without a semantic redraw.
image.desc_semantic_direct: Performs a creative redraw via vision + generate. Better for infographics, composition, color, and complex layouts.
image.desc_semantic_structured: Performs a content-conservative redraw in an office presentation style. Better for diagrams, tables, and structural images.
image.desc_compare_all: Builds safe, creative, and structural variants at once so you can pick the best before the final DOCX.
result.partial_available_warning: An intermediate Markdown result from the last run is available.
preview.markdown_help: Only one Markdown block is shown on screen to keep the interface responsive for large documents.
preview.normalization: Paragraph normalization: raw {raw} -> logical {logical} | merges: {groups} groups, {merged} paragraphs
status.size_meta: Size: {size} MB | Paragraphs: {paragraphs} | Images: {images} | Characters: {chars} | Blocks: {blocks}
status.conversion_reused: Conversion: reusing the already converted DOCX copy; re-import is skipped.
structure.overview_message: Detected {count} reviewable sections for partial translation. Review the list below to decide what should be translated separately.
structure.diagnostic_warning: Some section boundaries need manual review before partial translation: {details}
structure.invalidation_fingerprint_chang: Detected chapter structure changed after re-analysis.
structure.invalidation_settings_changed: Detection-affecting settings changed since the last confirmation.
structure.invalidation_review_again: Review the chapter list and confirm structure again before processing selected chapters.
structure.terminology_caption: Session-scoped glossary candidates extracted from the current analysis. These terms are already injected into translate prompts for this run.
structure.advanced_tools_caption: Technical details for export, support, and structure diffing. Not required for normal translation review.
structure.compare_manifest_help: Import a previously exported .segments.json manifest to compare it with the current analysis.
structure.import_unable_read: Unable to read imported structure manifest: {filename}
structure.import_unable_read_bytes: Unable to read imported structure manifest bytes: {filename}
structure.import_unable_parse: Unable to parse imported structure manifest {filename}: {error}
structure.import_not_object: Imported structure manifest must be a JSON object: {filename}
structure.import_no_fingerprint: Imported structure manifest does not contain structure_fingerprint: {filename}
structure.import_ready: Imported structure manifest ready for comparison: {filename}
structure.search_placeholder: Search by section title or warning
structure.visible_hierarchy: Hierarchy in current view: {parent} main sections | {child} nested sections
structure.currently_unavailable_view: Currently unavailable in this view: {count} sections already queued or processing.
structure.status_hint_completed: Completed in this session. You can select this section again if you need a revised translation.
structure.status_hint_failed: Failed in this session. Use Retry Failed or select this section again for another translation pass.
structure.status_hint_skipped: Skipped in the current session workflow. It is usually left out of the final book by design.
structure.segment_warning: Review this section before partial translation: {title}. {suffix}
structure.segment_warning_default_suffix: Review the included text preview before translating this section separately.
structure.no_sections_match: No sections match the current filter/search.
structure.selection_hierarchy: Selection hierarchy: {top} main sections | {nested} nested sections
structure.selection_includes_nested: Selection also includes {count} nested sections under chosen parent sections.
structure.launch_skip: This launch will skip {count} sections that are already queued or processing.
structure.ready_note: Ready: confirmed structure | selection maps to translatable content.
structure.include_front_matter_help: When enabled, Selected + Context prepends front matter segments as source-backed context.
structure.include_toc_help: When enabled, Selected + Context prepends table-of-contents segments as source-backed context.
structure.retry_ready_current_session: Retry Failed is ready to rerun only the failed jobs recorded in the current session for those failed segments.
structure.retry_ready_persisted: Retry Failed is ready to rerun only the failed jobs from persisted retry state for this prepared document.
structure.retry_ready_default: Retry Failed is ready to rerun only those failed segments.
structure.retry_help_current_session: Reruns only the failed jobs recorded in the current session for the failed segments.
structure.retry_help_persisted: Reruns only the failed jobs recorded in persisted retry state for this prepared document.
structure.retry_help_blocked: Prepared jobs no longer match the current chapter boundaries. Re-prepare the document before rerunning failed segments.
structure.retry_help_default: Reruns only the segments marked failed for this prepared document.
structure.retry_summary_persisted: {count} sections have persisted failed work for this prepared document.
structure.retry_unavailable_confirm: Retry Failed unavailable: confirm the current outline before rerunning failed segments.
structure.retry_unavailable_mapping: Retry Failed unavailable: the current section boundaries no longer match the prepared document. Re-prepare the document before rerunning failed sections.
structure.retry_unavailable_no_content: Retry Failed unavailable: failed sections do not currently map to translatable content.
structure.process_unavailable_confirm_an: Process Selected unavailable: confirm the current outline and keep at least one selectable segment selected.
structure.process_unavailable_confirm: Process Selected unavailable: confirm the current outline before running the current chapter selection.
structure.process_unavailable_select: Process Selected unavailable: keep at least one selectable segment selected.
structure.process_unavailable_mapping: Process Selected unavailable: the current section boundaries no longer match the prepared document. Re-prepare the document before partial translation.
structure.process_unavailable_no_content: Process Selected unavailable: the current selection does not map to any translatable content.
structure.process_selected_help: Processes only the selected sections and produces a partial output artifact.
structure.selected_with_context_help: Processes the selected sections and prepends leading structural context such as front matter or TOC as source-backed content.
structure.structure_confirmed_success: Structure confirmed for the current prepared document.
structure.confirmation_confirmed: Structure confirmed | selected main {top} sections | selected nested {nested} sections
structure.confirmation_not_confirmed: Structure not confirmed. Process Selected stays disabled until the current outline is reviewed and confirmed.
structure.process_selected_now_note: Process Selected now runs only the chosen sections and produces a partial output artifact.
structure.selected_with_context_note: Selected + Context prepends leading source-backed structural context such as front matter or TOC before the first selected chapter.
structure.process_entire_book_ready: Process Entire Book is ready to produce the final translated book for the current session.
structure.selection_ready_unconfirmed: Current selection is ready for review, but chapter-based processing stays disabled until confirmation.
